creator: codeclimate.com

evidence.text: Furthermore, a positive culture of feedback can enhance psychological safety on teams. When feedback is a fundamental part of a blameless team culture , team members understand that feedback is critical to growing as a team and achieving key goals, and will likely feel more secure in sharing ideas, acknowledging weaknesses, and asking for help.

title: How to Create a Culture of Feedback in Your Engineering Organization - Code Climate Blog
